audit_items.proof_trace: Block executor validates regular gas limit (L119-127) but completely omits blob gas limit validation. Blob gas is accumulated (L152-154) without any check against MAX_BLOB_GAS_PER_BLOCK, allowing blocks to exceed consensus-mandated blob gas limits.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker submits multiple blob transactions whose cumulative blob gas exceeds MAX_BLOB_GAS_PER_BLOCK. Block executor accepts all transactions, producing an invalid block that violates consensus rules and will be rejected by other nodes.
